structs.name: Constant
docs: Constant represents a constant in a Go package.

structs.name: Field

fields.name: PtrStruct
fields.comment: Pointer to the struct that this field belongs to

docs: Field represents a field in a Go struct.
structs.definition:
type Field struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
	Type string `json:"type"`
	TypeDetails TypeDetails `json:"type_details"`
	Tag string `json:"tag,omitempty"`
	Private bool `json:"private"`
	Pointer bool `json:"pointer"`
	Slice bool `json:"slice"`
	Docs []string `json:"docs,omitempty"`
	Comment string `json:"comment,omitempty"`
	PtrStruct *Struct `json:"-"` // Pointer to the struct that this field belongs to
}

structs.name: Function

fields.name: Body
fields.comment: New field for function body

fields.name: Definition
fields.comment: Full Go code definition of the function

fields.name: IsExported
fields.comment: Whether the function is exported (public)

fields.name: IsTest
fields.comment: Whether the function is a test function (TestXxx)

fields.name: IsBenchmark
fields.comment: Whether the function is a benchmark function (BenchmarkXxx)

docs: Function represents a Go function with its parameters, return types, and documentation.
structs.definition:
type Function struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
	Params []Param `json:"params,omitempty"`
	Returns []Param `json:"returns,omitempty"`
	Docs []string `json:"docs,omitempty"`
	Signature string `json:"signature"`
	Body string `json:"body,omitempty"` // New field for function body
	Definition string `json:"definition,omitempty"` // Full Go code definition of the function
	IsExported bool `json:"is_exported"` // Whether the function is exported (public)
	IsTest bool `json:"is_test"` // Whether the function is a test function (TestXxx)
	IsBenchmark bool `json:"is_benchmark"` // Whether the function is a benchmark function (BenchmarkXxx)
}

structs.name: Import

fields.name: Name
fields.comment: the alias of the package as it's being imported

fields.name: PtrPackage
fields.comment: Pointer to the package that this import belongs to

structs.name: Interface

fields.name: Definition
fields.comment: Full Go code definition of the interface

fields.name: IsExported
fields.comment: Whether the interface is exported (public)

fields.name: PtrPackage
fields.comment: Pointer to the package that this interface belongs to

docs: Interface represents a Go interface and its methods.
structs.definition:
type Interface struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
	Methods []Method `json:"methods,omitempty"`
	Docs []string `json:"docs,omitempty"`
	Definition string `json:"definition,omitempty"` // Full Go code definition of the interface
	IsExported bool `json:"is_exported"` // Whether the interface is exported (public)
	PtrPackage *Package `json:"-"` // Pointer to the package that this interface belongs to
}

structs.name: Method

fields.name: Receiver
fields.comment: Receiver type (e.g., "*MyStruct" or "MyStruct")

fields.name: Body
fields.comment: New field for method body

fields.name: Definition
fields.comment: Full Go code definition of the method

fields.name: IsExported
fields.comment: Whether the method is exported (public)

fields.name: IsTest
fields.comment: Whether the method is a test method

fields.name: IsBenchmark
fields.comment: Whether the method is a benchmark method

fields.name: PtrStruct
fields.comment: Pointer to the struct that this method belongs to

docs: Method represents a method in a Go struct or interface.
structs.definition:
type Method struct {
	Receiver string `json:"receiver,omitempty"` // Receiver type (e.g., "*MyStruct" or "MyStruct")
	Name string `json:"name"`
	Params []Param `json:"params,omitempty"`
	Returns []Param `json:"returns,omitempty"`
	Docs []string `json:"docs,omitempty"`
	Signature string `json:"signature"`
	Body string `json:"body,omitempty"` // New field for method body
	Definition string `json:"definition,omitempty"` // Full Go code definition of the method
	IsExported bool `json:"is_exported"` // Whether the method is exported (public)
	IsTest bool `json:"is_test"` // Whether the method is a test method
	IsBenchmark bool `json:"is_benchmark"` // Whether the method is a benchmark method
	PtrStruct *Struct `json:"-"` // Pointer to the struct that this method belongs to
}

structs.name: Module

fields.name: RootModuleName
fields.comment: Name of the module as seen on the go.mod file of the project

fields.name: RelativeDirectory
fields.comment: Relative (to go.mod) directory of the module / or /cmd/something

fields.name: FullName
fields.comment: Full name of the module, including the relative directory should be RootModuleName/RelativeDirectory

docs: Module represents a Go module with its packages.

structs.name: Package

fields.name: Package
fields.comment: Name of the package as seen in the package declaration (e.g., "main")

fields.name: ModuleName
fields.comment: Name of the module as seen in the go.mod file

fields.name: PtrModule
fields.comment: Pointer to the module that this package belongs to

docs: Package represents a Go package with its components such as imports, structs, functions, etc.
structs.definition:
type Package struct {
	Package string `json:"package"` // Name of the package as seen in the package declaration (e.g., "main")
	ModuleName string `json:"module_name"` // Name of the module as seen in the go.mod file
	Imports []Import `json:"imports,omitempty"`
	Structs []Struct `json:"structs,omitempty"`
	Functions []Function `json:"functions,omitempty"`
	Variables []Variable `json:"variables,omitempty"`
	Constants []Constant `json:"constants,omitempty"`
	Interfaces []Interface `json:"interfaces,omitempty"`
	PtrModule *Module `json:"-"` // Pointer to the module that this package belongs to
}

structs.name: Param

fields.name: Name
fields.comment: Name of the parameter or return value

fields.name: Type
fields.comment: Type (e.g., "int", "*string")

fields.name: PtrMethod
fields.comment: Pointer to the method that this parameter belongs to

fields.name: PtrFunc
fields.comment: Pointer to the function that this parameter belongs to

docs: Param represents a parameter or return value in a Go function or method.
structs.definition:
type Param struct {
	Name string `json:"name"` // Name of the parameter or return value
	Type string `json:"type"` // Type (e.g., "int", "*string")
	TypeDetails TypeDetails `json:"type_details"`
	PtrMethod *Method `json:"-"` // Pointer to the method that this parameter belongs to
	PtrFunc *Function `json:"-"` // Pointer to the function that this parameter belongs to
}

structs.name: ParsedInfo

fields.name: Packages
fields.comment: Deprecated: use Modules instead

fields.name: Directory
fields.comment: if information was parsed from a directory. It's either a directory or a file

fields.name: File
fields.comment: if information was parsed from a single file. It's either a directory or a file

docs: ParsedInfo holds parsed information about Go packages.

structs.name: Struct

fields.name: Definition
fields.comment: Full Go code definition of the struct

fields.name: IsExported
fields.comment: Whether the struct is exported (public)

fields.name: PtrPackage
fields.comment: Pointer to the package that this struct belongs to

docs: Struct represents a Go struct and its fields and methods.
structs.definition:
type Struct struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
	Fields []Field `json:"fields,omitempty"`
	Methods []Method `json:"methods,omitempty"`
	Docs []string `json:"docs,omitempty"`
	Definition string `json:"definition,omitempty"` // Full Go code definition of the struct
	IsExported bool `json:"is_exported"` // Whether the struct is exported (public)
	PtrPackage *Package `json:"-"` // Pointer to the package that this struct belongs to
}

structs.name: TypeDetails

fields.name: Package
fields.comment: in the cases of external types. like pbhire.Person this would be "github.com/x/y/pbhire"

fields.name: PackageName
fields.comment: in the cases of external types. like pbhire.Person this would be "pbhire"

fields.name: Type
fields.comment: in the cases of external types. like pbhire.Person this would be "Person"

fields.name: IsBuiltin
fields.comment: if string, int, etc

fields.name: IsExternal
fields.comment: if the type is from another package

structs.definition:
type TypeDetails struct {
	Package *string // in the cases of external types. like pbhire.Person this would be "github.com/x/y/pbhire"
	PackageName *string // in the cases of external types. like pbhire.Person this would be "pbhire"
	Type *string // in the cases of external types. like pbhire.Person this would be "Person"
	TypeName string
	IsPointer bool
	IsSlice bool
	IsMap bool
	IsBuiltin bool // if string, int, etc
	IsExternal bool // if the type is from another package
	TypeReferences []TypeReference
}

structs.name: TypeReference

fields.name: Name
fields.comment: the name of the type, example TypeReference or Person or int32 or string

structs.name: Variable
docs: Variable represents a global variable in a Go package.

functions.name: ParseFile
docs: ParseFile parses a Go file or directory and returns the parsed information.

functions.name: ParseDirectory
docs: ParseDirectory parses a directory containing Go files and returns the parsed information.

functions.name: ParseString
docs: ParseString parses Go source code provided as a string and returns the parsed information.

functions.definition: func augment(m map[string]interface{}, n map[string]interface{}) map[string]interface{}

functions.name: ParseDirectoryRecursive
docs: ParseDirectoryRecursive parses a directory recursively and returns the parsed information.

docs: getModulePath reads the module name from the go.mod file.

docs: ParseDirectoryWithFilter parses a directory with an optional filter function to include specific files.
functions.definition: func ParseDirectoryWithFilter(fileOrDirectory string, filter func(fs.FileInfo) (bool)) (*ParsedInfo, error)

functions.name: extractStructs
docs: extractStructs extracts structs from the provided documentation package.

functions.name: extractInterfaces
docs: extractInterfaces extracts interfaces from the provided documentation package.

functions.name: extractImports
docs: extractImports extracts unique imports from the provided package.

docs: extractConstantsVariables extracts constants and variables from the provided package.

fieldListToString converts an *ast.FieldList to its string representation.
